theorem candidate_T3_routeA (root : PrimitiveNthRoot (N := N)) {a : Fin N} (ha : a ‚Č† 0) :
    ‚ąĎ x : Fin N, cyclicChar root a x = 0 := by
  classical
  rcases root with ‚ü®ő∂, hő∂N, hő∂_ne_one‚ü©
  have hN_gt_one : 1 < N := by
    by_contra h
    have hN_le_one : N ‚Č§ 1 := le_of_not_gt h
    have hN_ne_one : N ‚Č† 1 := by
      intro hN1
      apply ha
      ext
      simp [hN1]
    omega
  have hN_pos : 0 < N := lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hN_gt_one
  have hő∂_prim : IsPrimitiveRoot ő∂ N := by
    rw [IsPrimitiveRoot.iff_def]
    constructor
    ¬∑ exact hő∂N
    ¬∑ intro m hm hmN
      exact hő∂_ne_one m hm hmN
  have ha_coprime : Nat.Coprime a.1 N := by
    simpa [Fin.isCoprime_iff_gcd_eq_one] using a.isCoprime
  have hpow_prim : IsPrimitiveRoot (ő∂ ^ a.1) N :=
    hő∂_prim.pow_of_coprime a.1 ha_coprime
  calc
    ‚ąĎ x : Fin N, cyclicChar ‚ü®ő∂, hő∂N, hő∂_ne_one‚ü© a x
        = ‚ąĎ i in Finset.range N, (ő∂ ^ a.1) ^ i := by
            simp [cyclicChar, Fin.sum_univ_eq_sum_range, pow_mul]
    _ = 0 := by
      simpa [pow_mul] using hpow_prim.geom_sum_eq_zero hN_gt_one
```

    ‚ąĎ x : Fin N, cyclicChar root a x = 0 := by
  rcases root with ‚ü®ő∂, hő∂N, hprimitive‚ü©
  have hNpos : 0 < N := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (NeZero.ne N)
  have hNgt1 : 1 < N := by
    by_contra hle
    have hNle1 : N ‚Č§ 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt hle
    have hNeq1 : N = 1 := le_antisymm hNle1 hNpos
    have : (a : Fin N) = 0 := by
      apply Fin.ext
      simp [hNeq1]
    exact ha this
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime a.1 N := by
    simpa [Fin.ne_iff_vne] using a.isCoprime_val
  have hprimő∂ : IsPrimitiveRoot ő∂ N := by
    rw [IsPrimitiveRoot.iff_def]
    refine ‚ü®hő∂N, ?_‚ü©
    intro l hl
    by_cases hzero : l = 0
    ¬∑ simp [hzero]
    ¬∑ by_cases hlt : l < N
      ¬∑ by_contra hndvd
        have hone : ő∂ ^ l = 1 := hl
        exact (hprimitive l (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hzero) hlt) hone
      ¬∑ have hNL : N ‚Č§ l := Nat.le_of_not_gt hlt
        exact Nat.dvd_of_modEq_zero <| by
          have := hl
          simpa [Nat.modEq_iff_dvd']
  have hpowprim : IsPrimitiveRoot (ő∂ ^ a.1) N := hprimő∂.pow_of_coprime a.1 hcop
  have hsum : ‚ąĎ i ‚ąą Finset.range N, (ő∂ ^ a.1) ^ i = 0 := hpowprim.geom_sum_eq_zero hNgt1
  simpa [cyclicChar, Fin.sum_univ_eq_sum_range, pow_mul] using hsum
```

theorem candidate_T3_routeA (root : PrimitiveNthRoot (N := N)) {a : Fin N} (ha : a ‚Č† 0) :
    ‚ąĎ x : Fin N, cyclicChar root a x = 0 := by
  rcases root with ‚ü®ő∂, hő∂N, hprimitive‚ü©
  have hNpos : 0 < N := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (NeZero.ne N)
  have hNgt1 : 1 < N := by
    by_contra h
    have hNle1 : N ‚Č§ 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt h
    have hNeq1 : N = 1 := le_antisymm hNle1 hNpos
    have hSub : Subsingleton (Fin N) := by
      subst hNeq1
      infer_instance
    exact ha (Subsingleton.elim _ _)
  have hprim : IsPrimitiveRoot ő∂ N := by
    rw [IsPrimitiveRoot.iff_def]
    refine ‚ü®hő∂N, ?_‚ü©
    intro m hm
    by_cases hmN : m < N
    ¬∑ exact hprimitive m (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hm) hmN
    ¬∑ exact fun hEq => hmN (lt_of_not_ge fun hge => by
        have hdiv : N ‚ą£ m := by
          refine ‚ü®m / N, ?_‚ü©
          exact (Nat.div_eq_iff_eq_mul_left hNpos).2 rfl
        have hm0 : m = 0 := by
          have := congrArg Nat.succ (Nat.eq_zero_of_dvd_of_lt_Nat ?_ ?_)
          simp at this
          exact Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero (Nat.zero_le _)
        exact hm (by simpa [hm0]))
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime a.1 N := by
    refine Fin.isUnit_iff_coprime.mp ?_
    exact ‚ü®‚ü®a, 1, by ext <;> simp, by ext <;> simp‚ü©, rfl‚ü©
  have hprimPow : IsPrimitiveRoot (ő∂ ^ a.1) N := hprim.pow_of_coprime a.1 hcop
  have hsum : ‚ąĎ i in Finset.range N, (ő∂ ^ a.1) ^ i = 0 := hprimPow.geom_sum_eq_zero hNgt1
  simpa [cyclicChar, Fin.sum_univ_eq_sum_range, pow_mul] using hsum

theorem candidate_T3_routeA (root : PrimitiveNthRoot (N := N)) {a : Fin N} (ha : a ‚Č† 0) :
    ‚ąĎ x : Fin N, cyclicChar root a x = 0 := by
  rcases root with ‚ü®ő∂, hő∂N, hprimitive‚ü©
  have hNpos : 0 < N := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (NeZero.ne N)
  have hNgt1 : 1 < N := by
    by_contra h
    have hNle1 : N ‚Č§ 1 := Nat.le_of_not_gt h
    have hNge1 : 1 ‚Č§ N := Nat.succ_le_of_lt hNpos
    have hN1 : N = 1 := le_antisymm hNle1 hNge1
    have hsub : Subsingleton (Fin N) := by
      subst hN1
      infer_instance
    exact ha (Subsingleton.elim _ _)
  have ha_pos : 0 < a.1 :=
    Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (fun h0 => ha (Fin.ext h0))
  have ha_lt : a.1 < N := a.2
  let ŌČ : ‚Ąā := ő∂ ^ a.1
  have hŌČ_ne_one : ŌČ ‚Č† 1 := by
    dsimp [ŌČ]
    exact hprimitive a.1 ha_pos ha_lt
  have hŌČN : ŌČ ^ N = 1 := by
    dsimp [ŌČ]
    rw [pow_mul]
    rw [hő∂N, one_pow]
  have hsum_range : Finset.sum (Finset.range N) (fun i => ŌČ ^ i) = 0 := by
    have hgeom := geom_sum_mul ŌČ N
    have hmul_zero : Finset.sum (Finset.range N) (fun i => ŌČ ^ i) * (ŌČ - 1) = 0 := by
      calc
        Finset.sum (Finset.range N) (fun i => ŌČ ^ i) * (ŌČ - 1) = ŌČ ^ N - 1 := by
          simpa using hgeom
        _ = 0 := by rw [hŌČN, sub_self]
    have hŌČm1_ne_zero : ŌČ - 1 ‚Č† 0 := by
      intro h
      apply hŌČ_ne_one
      have : ŌČ = 1 := sub_eq_zero.mp h
      exact this
    exact mul_eq_zero.mp hmul_zero |>.resolve_right hŌČm1_ne_zero
  have hcyclic : ‚ąÄ x : Fin N, cyclicChar ‚ü®ő∂, hő∂N, hprimitive‚ü© a x = ŌČ ^ x.1 := by
    intro x
    simp [cyclicChar, ŌČ, pow_mul]
  calc
    ‚ąĎ x : Fin N, cyclicChar ‚ü®ő∂, hő∂N, hprimitive‚ü© a x
        = ‚ąĎ x : Fin N, ŌČ ^ x.1 := by
            refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
            intro x hx
            exact hcyclic x
    _ = Finset.sum (Finset.range N) (fun i => ŌČ ^ i) := by
          simpa using (Fin.sum_univ_eq_sum_range (f := fun i => ŌČ ^ i) N).symm
    _ = 0 := hsum_range
